title: edapack build-inputs
description: Declarative description of a tool's input components, resolved by resolve-inputs.py.

name.description: Unique input name; used as the manifest key.

repo.description: Git URL used to resolve refs (git ls-remote / releases API).

policy.description: Resolution policy: branch:<b> | tag:<t> | latest-release | latest-tag.

track.description: If false, recorded in the manifest but excluded from inputs_digest (no change-gate trigger).
